description: Query the aggregated EU Digital Services Act VLOP transparency reports (tables 3–11) with structured parameters (no SQL). Pick a `table` (GET /tables), describe filters/group_by/aggregates, get a job id, then poll for results as JSON or CSV. Query syntax follows the TikTok Research API: boolean and/or/not clauses of {operation, field_name, field_values}.

tools.name: admin_approve-registration
tools.description: Restore (or pre-create) an approved account — e.g. to undo a revoke. Required: email. Returns the new ResponseApproveRegistrationApiAdminRegistrationsEmailApprovePost.

tools.name: admin_list-registrations
tools.description: List researcher registrations, optionally filtered by status. Optional: status. Returns the ResponseListRegistrationsApiAdminRegistrationsGet.

tools.name: admin_revoke-registration
tools.description: Revoke an account's access (its live sessions stop working immediately). Required: email. Returns the new ResponseRevokeRegistrationApiAdminRegistrationsEmailRevokePost.

tools.name: ask_ask
tools.description: Authenticated natural-language query: an LLM translates the question into the *structured* QueryRequest (never SQL), which is then run through the exact same compile_query trust boundary as /api/explore. The model only proposes — a bad field is a 400, and no model-authored SQL can reach the database. Requires an API key (sign in to get one) — LLM calls cost money, so this is gated and rate-limited per key. Disabled (503) unless ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set. Required: question. Returns the new ResponseAskApiAskPost.

params.name: question
params.description: A natural-language question about the DSA VLOP data.

tools.name: dsa-vlop-transparency-api_root
tools.description: Root. Returns the ResponseRootApiGet.

tools.name: dsa-vlop-transparency-auth_google
tools.description: Auth Google. Required: credential. Returns the new ResponseAuthGoogleApiAuthGooglePost.

params.name: credential
params.description: Google ID token (JWT) from Google Identity Services / FedCM.

tools.name: dsa-vlop-transparency-jobs_cancel
tools.description: Cancel Job. Required: job_id. Returns the ResponseCancelJobApiJobsJobIdDelete. Destructive.

tools.name: dsa-vlop-transparency-jobs_get
tools.description: Get Job. Required: job_id. Returns the ResponseGetJobApiJobsJobIdGet.

tools.name: dsa-vlop-transparency-jobs_list
tools.description: List Jobs. Optional: limit (default: 50). Returns the ResponseListJobsApiJobsGet.

tools.name: dsa-vlop-transparency-jobs_download_job-result
tools.description: Secure download via a signed, expiring URL — no API key needed. The link is a capability: the HMAC signature authorises this exact job + format + expiry, so possession of a valid, unexpired URL is sufficient. Required: job_id, expires, sig. Optional: format (default: json).

tools.name: dsa-vlop-transparency-jobs_result_get-job
tools.description: Get Job Result. Required: job_id. Optional: format (default: json).

tools.name: dsa-vlop-transparency-version_version
tools.description: The deployed build (commit SHA on Cloud Run, else 'dev') + app version. Returns the ResponseVersionVersionGet.

tools.name: explore_explore
tools.description: Public, synchronous, bounded query for the interactive dashboard. Same validated structured-query model as POST /api/query (no SQL is ever accepted; every field/operation is checked against the table registry and all values are bound), but it runs inline and hard-caps the row count — no auth, no job, no webhook. IP-rate-limited so the open endpoint can't be hammered. Optional: aggregates, callback_url, derived (plus 9 more). Returns the new ResponseExploreApiExplorePost.

params.name: callback_url
params.description: Optional http(s) webhook POSTed (HMAC-signed) when the job finishes.

params.name: derived
params.description: Computed columns over leg aggregates (composite queries only).

params.name: fields
params.description: Columns to return for a raw (non-aggregated) query. Defaults to all fields.

params.name: join_on
params.description: Dimensions to merge legs on; must be a dimension of every leg's table.

params.name: legs
params.description: Composite query: named single-table sub-queries to merge (2–4; leg names are letters/digits/underscores).

params.name: table
params.description: Which DSA report table to query (see GET /tables).

tools.name: explore_options
tools.description: Public metadata for the dashboard's query builder: each table's queryable dimensions and measures, from the fixed registry (no DB, no secrets). Returns the ResponseExploreOptionsApiExploreOptionsGet.

tools.name: fields_list
tools.description: Fields for a report table (`?table=…`), or an overview of all tables. Optional: table. Returns the ResponseListFieldsApiFieldsGet.

tools.name: healthz_health
tools.description: Health. Returns the ResponseHealthHealthzGet.

tools.name: metrics_metrics
tools.description: Prometheus metrics. No auth — scrape over an internal network only.

tools.name: overview_overview
tools.description: Public headline aggregates for the dashboard — no auth. Memoised: the read-only DB is static, so we compute the fixed queries once (no user input reaches SQL) and serve from memory thereafter. Returns the ResponseOverviewApiOverviewGet.

tools.name: portal_page
tools.description: Serve the researcher portal single-page app.

tools.name: portal_register
tools.description: Issue a demo API key for a researcher (no real authentication). Required: email, name. Returns the new ResponsePortalRegisterApiPortalRegisterPost.

tools.name: portal_revoke-key
tools.description: Revoke the calling key/session (configured demo keys can't be revoked). Returns the ResponseRevokeKeyApiPortalKeyDelete. Destructive.

tools.name: query_submit
tools.description: Submit Query. Optional: aggregates, callback_url, derived (plus 9 more). Returns the new ResponseSubmitQueryApiQueryPost.

params.name: callback_url
params.description: Optional http(s) webhook POSTed (HMAC-signed) when the job finishes.

params.name: derived
params.description: Computed columns over leg aggregates (composite queries only).

params.name: fields
params.description: Columns to return for a raw (non-aggregated) query. Defaults to all fields.

params.name: join_on
params.description: Dimensions to merge legs on; must be a dimension of every leg's table.

params.name: legs
params.description: Composite query: named single-table sub-queries to merge (2–4; leg names are letters/digits/underscores).

params.name: table
params.description: Which DSA report table to query (see GET /tables).

tools.name: readyz_ready
tools.description: Ready. Returns the ResponseReadyReadyzGet.

tools.name: schema_table
tools.description: The queryable field registry (dimensions + measures) for a report table. Required: table. Returns the ResponseTableSchemaApiSchemaTableGet.

tools.name: static_vendored-asset
tools.description: Serve a vendored third-party asset (e.g. Chart.js) from static/vendor. Required: filename.

tools.name: tables_list
tools.description: The queryable DSA report tables and the dataset's reporting period. Returns the ResponseListTablesApiTablesGet.
